title: QRTagAll Product Tour
desc: Scan this QR — this is the product. No app needed. One scan explains living identity, privacy controls, attachments, and owner-verified contact — the platform before any vertical story.

title: Construction Site Operations
desc: Construction sites lose money to wrong crews, missing permits, and invisible status. QRTagAll on the site board and material cages gives gate-level orientation, lift plans, and links to per-machine compliance — the scan layer on top of...

title: Construction Equipment
desc: Sites run on compliance paper. QRTagAll in the cab links inspection PASS, maintenance log, daily sheets, incident photos before the operator starts.

title: Warehouse and 3PL
desc: Warehouses bleed margin on mis-picks, shrinkage, and temp workers without SOPs. QRTagAll on a pallet or bin is the field-readable identity: location, batch, count date, damage notes — companion to WMS, not a replacement.

title: Transport Fleet
desc: Fleet operators lose on roadside compliance failures, paper manifests, and tractor-trailer mix-ups. QRTagAll on cab and trailer is the driver's scan-at-departure layer: checklists, certs, load docs — while TMS/telematics stays the...

title: Robotic Fleet
desc: Robotic fleets stall when technicians hunt manuals and shift notes. QRTagAll on each AMR is the human-readable layer: firmware, calibration, faults, handoff — alongside vendor fleet software, not instead of it.

title: Supply Chain Authenticity
desc: Premium food claims need proof at the crate. QRTagAll links batch ID to farm, harvest, pack dates, certifications, and cold-chain stages — farm-to-shelf transparency for retailers and conscious buyers.

title: Farm Produce Traceability
desc: Organic and export claims face scepticism. QRTagAll on a grain bag ties batch to farmer, mill dates, organic cert, and lab panel — defensible premium from farm to retailer.

title: Rental Equipment
desc: Rental disputes are condition disputes. QRTagAll on camera bodies and tools timestamps issue condition, rental history, damage log, and policy at handover and return.

title: Medical Records Organizer
desc: Health information is usually scattered — wallet cards, hospital folders, WhatsApp PDFs, insurer apps. QRTagAll attaches one QR to a physical anchor (wallet card, sticker, medical ID) and links it to a structured sheet: emergency facts...

title: Vehicle Emergency Sticker
desc: In a roadside crisis, strangers need vehicle identity, insurance validity, and medical hints — not the owner's private mobile on a public sticker.

title: Lost & Found
desc: Lost items need finders, not exposed phone numbers. QRTagAll inside a bag flap shows item description, reward, and instructions; reunion runs through Message Owner.

title: Pet ID Collar
desc: Lost pets need finders, not published owner mobiles. QRTagAll on a collar shows pet details, vet notes, and friendly instructions; Message Owner for reunion.

title: Appliance Warranty & Repair
desc: Appliances outlive their paperwork — invoices fade, manuals get lost, warranty dates live in email threads. QRTagAll sticks one QR on the product or install location (door frame, back panel, utility closet) and links to a living sheet:...

title: House Ownership & Repair
desc: Property paperwork spans decades — sale deeds, society shares, tax receipts, renovation logs, tenant leases. QRTagAll on a kitchen counter or meter cupboard gives buyers and contractors one scan for transparent maintenance history while...

title: Vehicle History Recorder
desc: Used-vehicle trust fails on verbal claims. QRTagAll on a sun visor or listing plate bundles RC, insurance, service tables, and invoices as verifiable history for buyers; finance and asking price stay NOVIEW.

title: Workshop Tool
desc: Home garages duplicate tools and lose manuals. QRTagAll on a impact driver links manual PDF, bit inventory, maintenance, location drawer — DIY organisation in one scan.

title: Community Sharing
desc: Shared drills and tools disappear into WhatsApp chaos. QRTagAll on the society shelf shows borrow rules, who has it, due date, and office contact — accountability without a new app for residents.

title: Guest House and Airbnb
desc: Guests arrive tired and ask the same WiFi questions. QRTagAll by the door is the digital welcome packet: password, rules, appliance tips, local map — host updates without re-laminating.

title: Educational Certificates
desc: Degrees, marksheets, and certificates pile up in folders and lose relevance the moment someone needs a quick proof. QRTagAll turns a resume sticker, ID lanyard, or portfolio cover into a credential wallet: public VIEW artifacts for...

title: Student Portfolio ID
desc: School ID cards show a photo and roll number; achievements live elsewhere. QRTagAll on the lanyard adds awards table, project PDFs while parent phones stay NOVIEW.

title: Digital Business Card
desc: Paper cards go stale the week after printing. QRTagAll on the last card in your wallet keeps resume, case studies, links, and contact updated — professional presence that survives networking events.

title: Handcrafted Fashion
desc: Handloom buyers ask 'real or machine?' QRTagAll on the hang tag shows artisan, hours, journey table, process photos — authenticity as wearable proof for craft brands.

title: Artworks & Antiques
desc: Provenance drives art market trust. QRTagAll beside a plaque links COA, ownership chain, exhibition history, restoration reports, and detail images; valuation stays NOVIEW.

title: Museum Exhibit
desc: Wall plaques are 50 words; learners want depth. QRTagAll delivers extended label, audio link, detail images, donor metadata — culture beyond physical space, accessibility for curious visitors.

title: Heirloom Memory Vault
desc: Objects outlast memory unless stories are attached. QRTagAll inside a watch case or jewellery box preserves family narrative, timeline, photos, and optional appraisal (NOVIEW).

title: Memento
desc: Souvenirs are memory anchors. QRTagAll on a desk totem reopens the trip story, photos, and places — not clutter, a capsule you can re-scan years later.

title: Wedding Memory
desc: Wedding day ends; photos keep arriving. QRTagAll on the invitation becomes a growing album: official shots, guest upload link, highlight video — one-day event → months of shared memory.

title: Event Management
desc: Printed menus and posters go stale by hour two. QRTagAll on a stall counter is the live menu and offer board — update once, every scan stays current.

title: Plant & Tree Tagging
desc: Plants outlive the nursery staff who sold them. QRTagAll on pot or stake carries species ID, soil recipe, seasonal watering, pest notes, and care PDF — living product support that reduces returns and builds nursery brand after purchase.

title: Pot Plant Journey
desc: Beyond care instructions — QRTagAll turns a desk plant into a shared diary: milestones, repot dates, progress photos. Emotional, social, low-stakes proof that a QR can tell a story over months, not just specs.
